test_framework: Astro build validation (no test framework needed for static site)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to ensure the site builds without errors. 2. Run npm run preview to serve the built site and verify pages render correctly.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/ryancormack.com 2. npm create astro@latest . 3. npm install
environment_constraints: Node.js 22 available. OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full npm access. No Docker needed for static site.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - no existing contribution guidelines.
key_patterns: Astro project with .astro components, TypeScript, CSS custom properties for theming, responsive design.
directory_structure: Standard Astro project: src/pages/ for routes, src/components/ for reusable components, src/layouts/ for page layouts, public/ for static assets
